query:
-- Primeiro, ver qual equipe o Guilherme gerencia
SELECT e.id as equipe_id, e.nome as equipe_nome, e.gestorId
FROM equipes e
WHERE e.gestorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'guilherme.97fn@gmail.com');

-- Ver corretores dessa equipe
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.equipeId
FROM users u
WHERE u.equipeId IN (
  SELECT id FROM equipes WHERE gestorId = (
    SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'guilherme.97fn@gmail.com'
  )
);

-- Contar leads de cada corretor
SELECT 
  u.name as corretor,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.id IN (
  SELECT u2.id FROM users u2
  WHERE u2.equipeId IN (
    SELECT id FROM equipes WHERE gestorId = (
      SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'guilherme.97fn@gmail.com'
    )
  )
)
GROUP BY u.id, u.name;
